description: BCM-RAG Golden Query Dataset — manually annotated queries for regression testing

queries.query: VMM电源管理模式有哪些？
queries.notes: Should return state definitions: Abandoned, Inactive, Convenience, Driving

queries.query: 车窗防夹功能如何检测和反应？
queries.notes: Should return anti-pinch detection logic and reaction

queries.query: ExteriorLight的配置参数有哪些？
queries.notes: Should return NVM parameter config table

queries.query: IGN1继电器由谁控制？控制逻辑是什么？
queries.notes: IGN1 relay controlled by VMM based on power mode transitions

queries.query: 门锁自动上锁的触发条件是什么？
queries.notes: Auto-lock conditions via speed/door state

queries.query: 雨刮间歇模式如何工作？
queries.notes: Wiper intermittent mode with timer logic

queries.query: CAN信号PEPS_UsageMode有哪些取值？
queries.notes: Signal coding: 0x0=Inactive, 0x1=Convenience, 0x2=Driving, 0x3=Invalid

queries.query: 近光灯的激活逻辑是什么？
queries.notes: Low beam activation: position light on + convenience/driving + switch on

queries.query: BCM休眠条件有哪些？
queries.notes: Sleep conditions for BCM network sleep

queries.query: 转向灯优先级管理规则是什么？
queries.notes: Turn signal priority: external alarm > crash > emergency brake > door open...

queries.query: 什么是Abandoned模式？
queries.notes: Final sleep mode, lowest power consumption

queries.query: DTC故障码的检测和恢复机制是什么？
queries.notes: Fault detection, reaction, and recovery for DTC codes

queries.query: 碰撞解锁功能如何触发？
queries.notes: Crash unlock triggered by ACU_CrashOutputSts signal

queries.query: BCM如何判断钥匙电量低？
queries.notes: Key low battery detection: 3 consecutive ignition cycles

queries.query: 日间行车灯的开启和关闭条件是什么？
queries.notes: DRL activation: low beam off, DRL config, voltage > 9V, power ready

queries.query: 危险报警灯和转向灯的优先级关系是什么？
queries.notes: Hazard light has priority over turn signal, turn signal paused

queries.query: 后雾灯的激活和关闭条件？
queries.notes: Rear fog: position+low beam on, convenience/driving, switch pressed

queries.query: 车窗GlobalClose功能是什么？
queries.notes: Global close: one-click close all windows via key fob

queries.query: PEPS无钥匙启动认证流程是什么？
queries.notes: PIAS authentication flow with LF/RF

queries.query: BCM唤醒条件有哪些？
queries.notes: Wake-up conditions: CAN wake, network management, hardware signals

queries.query: 电压低于6V时系统行为是什么？
queries.notes: Stop voltage mode: enter at 6V falling, exit at 6.5V rising

queries.query: 紧急制动危险报警闪烁何时激活？
queries.notes: Emergency brake hazard flash: ESC_HAZActive or VCU_HB_DoubleFlashLampOn

queries.query: 灯光未关提醒的触发条件是什么？
queries.notes: Light left on warning: inactive 500ms + position light on + driver door open

queries.query: 电源模式从Convenience进入Driving需要什么条件？
queries.notes: Driving entry: brake + key valid + no charger + D/R gear + StartRequest

queries.query: 系统如何响应IG OFF后的节电控制？
queries.notes: Power saving: entry actions, relay control after IG OFF

queries.query: VMM的PEPS_UsageMode信号编码定义是什么？
queries.notes: PEPS_UsageMode signal coding table in VMM section

queries.query: InteriorLight的ShortTermLighting状态有哪些迁移？
queries.notes: State transitions: OFF ↔ ShortTermLighting → LongTermLighting etc.

queries.query: 防盗系统ATWS的报警状态如何进入和退出？
queries.notes: ATWS Alarm/Disarmed/Prearmed state transitions

queries.query: 车窗防夹故障DTC码B155C的检测条件是什么？
queries.notes: Specific DTC fault detection for window anti-pinch

queries.query: ExteriorLight的电压范围参数有哪些？
queries.notes: Voltage range parameters for ExteriorLight

queries.query: VMM如何判断进入Driving模式的条件是否满足？
queries.notes: Driving entry conditions: brake, key, gear, etc.

queries.query: 门锁CrashUnlock功能的信号依赖关系是什么？
queries.notes: CrashUnlock signal chain: ACU_CrashOutputSts → Lock module

queries.query: 雨刮电机的PWM占空比控制参数是什么？
queries.notes: Wiper motor PWM duty cycle parameters

queries.query: BCM网络休眠时VMM内部状态迁移流程是什么？
queries.notes: Network sleep state machine flow: Convenience → Inactive → Abandoned
